textByHash.5f44995bd9510cd755b1924f313c54158fa34710: Hello! Nice day we're having today. You here for business, or just a drink?
textByHash.6291bcbe23aabc02ced9702cdc69d9db0a7d09f4: Anyway, even if you did just wash up here, I'm sure you'll find something to keep you around. There's all sorts of opportunities here on the Pandemonium. On that note, I won't keep you. See you later!
textByHash.7d2b0b9a35b63d907290c56f8d362f62ba26dcb6: It's where the tortugans, my people, live. Well, it's where the juveniles and elders live at least. Us adults leave the island to find our calling in the wider world.
textByHash.87fb27986d9eab3332e1404ba50cbbc15ed7e38c: Ah, it was the same for me. After I left the Great Conch I didn't really have too much of a goal in mind to be honest. I decided to just explore the world. I started swimming and ended up here!
textByHash.93014203258d49691a61ed2c644e44c7ea675231: I'd tell you to visit, but you don't get many humans allowed on the island. My people prefer their privacy. Who knows though, maybe one day you'll be one of the lucky few who get to go there!
textByHash.f9886d57a96d35bac8802b1f9e6ee246341fc003: Anyway, I shouldn't keep you. I'm sure you've got plenty to be doing. See you later!
